class_features.name: Fighting Style: Defense
class_features.description: While wearing armor, Aldric gains a +1 bonus to Armor Class. Applies whenever the body slot is filled with any armor item (included in derived AC).

class_features.name: Second Wind
class_features.description: On their turn, Aldric may spend a bonus action to draw on a reserve of stamina and regain 1d10 + fighter level hit points. Once per short or long rest. Tracked as the 'second_wind' resource; decrement on use via [RESOURCE_USE: second_wind].

class_features.name: Action Surge
class_features.description: On their turn, Aldric may push themselves beyond normal limits to take one additional action that turn (most often a second weapon attack). Once per short or long rest. Tracked as the 'action_surge' resource; decrement on use via [RESOURCE_USE: action_surge].

class_features.name: Martial Archetype: Champion — Improved Critical
class_features.description: Aldric's weapon attacks score a critical hit on a natural 19 or 20, not only 20. Applies to all attacks made with a melee or ranged weapon.
